languages.text: "Утверждение первое: мой разум болен. Это неопровержимый факт. Я вычислил это давно — 49 лет и 138 суток тому назад, если быть точным. Взвесив все доводы, я предпочел бездействие — решение эгоистичное в своей рациональности. Я верю, что попытавшись исцелить свое безумие, я бы угас сильно раньше".

"Thesis one: my mind is sick. This is an incontrovertible fact. I deduced it long ago — 49 years and 138 days ago, to be precise. After weighing all the arguments, I chose inaction — a decision egotistical in its rationality. I believe that, had I attempted to cure my insanity, I would have declined all the sooner."
languages.original_text: "Утверждение первое: мой разум болен. Это неопровержимый факт. Я вычислил это давно — 49 лет и 138 суток тому назад, если быть точным. Взвесив все доводы, я предпочел бездействие — решение эгоистичное в своей рациональности. Я верю, что попытавшись исцелить свое безумие, я бы угас сильно раньше".

After weighing all the arguments, I chose inaction — a decision egotistical in its rationality. I believe that, had I attempted to cure my insanity, I would have declined all the sooner."

After weighing all the arguments, I chose inaction — a decision egotistical in its rationality. I believe that, had I attempted to cure my insanity, I would have declined all the sooner."

"Thesis one: my mind is sick. This is an incontrovertible fact. I deduced it long ago — 49 years and 138 days ago, to be precise. After weighing all the arguments, I chose inaction — a decision egotistical in its rationality. I believe that, had I attempted to cure my insanity, I would have declined all the sooner."

languages.text: «Tesis uno: mi mente está enferma. Este es un hecho irrefutable. Lo deduje hace mucho. Concretamente, hace 49 años y 138 días. Tras sopesar todos los argumentos, opté por la inacción, una decisión racional a la par que egoísta. Considero que, de haber intentado tratar mi locura, mi declive se habría producido mucho antes».
languages.original_text: "Thesis one: my mind is sick. This is an incontrovertible fact. I deduced it long ago — 49 years and 138 days ago, to be precise. After weighing all the arguments, I chose inaction — a decision egotistical in its rationality. I believe that, had I attempted to cure my insanity, I would have declined all the sooner."

traits.locale_text: «Tesis uno: mi mente está enferma. Este es un hecho irrefutable. Lo deduje hace mucho. Concretamente, hace 49 años y 138 días. Tras sopesar todos los argumentos, opté por la inacción, una decisión racional a la par que egoísta. Considero que, de haber intentado tratar mi locura, mi declive se habría producido mucho antes».

languages.text: “论点一：我的心智病了。这是不争的事实。我很久以前就推导出了这点，准确说，是49年零138天前。权衡所有论据后，我选择了不作为——一个极其理性，也极其自私的决定。我相信，我当初要是试图去治疗这疯病，我只会衰退得更快。”
languages.original_text: "Thesis one: my mind is sick. This is an incontrovertible fact. I deduced it long ago — 49 years and 138 days ago, to be precise. After weighing all the arguments, I chose inaction — a decision egotistical in its rationality. I believe that, had I attempted to cure my insanity, I would have declined all the sooner."

traits.locale_text: “论点一：我的心智病了。这是不争的事实。我很久以前就推导出了这点，准确说，是49年零138天前。权衡所有论据后，我选择了不作为——一个极其理性，也极其自私的决定。我相信，我当初要是试图去治疗这疯病，我只会衰退得更快。”

languages.text: « Hypothèse numéro un : mon esprit est malade. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. Voilà bien longtemps que je m'en suis rendu compte : il y a 49 ans et 138 jours, très précisément. Après avoir pesé tous les arguments, j'ai pris une décision d'une rationalité égotiste en choisissant l'inaction. Si j'avais tenté de soigner ma folie, je pense que mon déclin n'en aurait été que plus rapide. »
languages.original_text: "Thesis one: my mind is sick. This is an incontrovertible fact. I deduced it long ago — 49 years and 138 days ago, to be precise. After weighing all the arguments, I chose inaction — a decision egotistical in its rationality. I believe that, had I attempted to cure my insanity, I would have declined all the sooner."

traits.locale_text: « Hypothèse numéro un : mon esprit est malade. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. Voilà bien longtemps que je m'en suis rendu compte : il y a 49 ans et 138 jours, très précisément. Après avoir pesé tous les arguments, j'ai pris une décision d'une rationalité égotiste en choisissant l'inaction. Si j'avais tenté de soigner ma folie, je pense que mon déclin n'en aurait été que plus rapide. »

languages.text: "Birinci tez: Zihnim hasta. Bu tartışılmaz bir gerçek. Bunu uzun zaman önce, kesin olmak gerekirse 49 yıl ve 138 gün önce çıkarsadım. Tüm argümanları tarttıktan sonra eylemsizliği seçtim. Rasyonel olduğu kadar bencilce de bir karardı. Deliliğimi iyileştirmeye çalışsaydım çok daha erken çökeceğime inanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Thesis one: my mind is sick. This is an incontrovertible fact. I deduced it long ago — 49 years and 138 days ago, to be precise. After weighing all the arguments, I chose inaction — a decision egotistical in its rationality. I believe that, had I attempted to cure my insanity, I would have declined all the sooner."

traits.locale_text: "Birinci tez: Zihnim hasta. Bu tartışılmaz bir gerçek. Bunu uzun zaman önce, kesin olmak gerekirse 49 yıl ve 138 gün önce çıkarsadım. Tüm argümanları tarttıktan sonra eylemsizliği seçtim. Rasyonel olduğu kadar bencilce de bir karardı. Deliliğimi iyileştirmeye çalışsaydım çok daha erken çökeceğime inanıyorum."

languages.text: "These: Mein Verstand ist krank. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Ich habe sie vor langer Zeit aufgestellt ... vor 49 Jahren und 138 Tagen, um genau zu sein. Nach Prüfung aller Argumente beschloss ich, nichts zu tun ... eine in ihrer Rationalität sehr egoistische Entscheidung. Ich glaube, wenn ich versucht hätte, meinen Wahnsinn zu heilen, wäre ich noch schneller verfallen.
languages.original_text: "Thesis one: my mind is sick. This is an incontrovertible fact. I deduced it long ago — 49 years and 138 days ago, to be precise. After weighing all the arguments, I chose inaction — a decision egotistical in its rationality. I believe that, had I attempted to cure my insanity, I would have declined all the sooner."

traits.locale_text: "These: Mein Verstand ist krank. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Ich habe sie vor langer Zeit aufgestellt ... vor 49 Jahren und 138 Tagen, um genau zu sein. Nach Prüfung aller Argumente beschloss ich, nichts zu tun ... eine in ihrer Rationalität sehr egoistische Entscheidung. Ich glaube, wenn ich versucht hätte, meinen Wahnsinn zu heilen, wäre ich noch schneller verfallen.

languages.text: 「テーゼその一――私の精神は病んでいる。これは議論の余地のない事実だ。私はずっと以前にそう推断した――正確には四十九年と百三十八日前のことだ。あらゆる論拠を秤にかけたうえで、私は何もしないことを選んだ――その合理性ゆえに利己的な決断だった。狂気を治そうと試みていたなら、私はかえってもっと早く衰えていただろうと考えている。」
languages.original_text: "Thesis one: my mind is sick. This is an incontrovertible fact. I deduced it long ago — 49 years and 138 days ago, to be precise. After weighing all the arguments, I chose inaction — a decision egotistical in its rationality. I believe that, had I attempted to cure my insanity, I would have declined all the sooner."

traits.locale_text: 「テーゼその一――私の精神は病んでいる。これは議論の余地のない事実だ。私はずっと以前にそう推断した――正確には四十九年と百三十八日前のことだ。あらゆる論拠を秤にかけたうえで、私は何もしないことを選んだ――その合理性ゆえに利己的な決断だった。狂気を治そうと試みていたなら、私はかえってもっと早く衰えていただろうと考えている。」
